title: Goal Widget - Breakdown By Group
excerpt:

posts.author: jlarbus (Jake Larbus)
posts.cookedHtml:
Having the ability for the Goal Widget to sum by Group would allow me to track against multiple goals using a single column, which would be much cleaner than how I currently have to setup my board.

I track total implementation in my overview boards, which include different categories / Groups that each have a unique goal. To accurately capture each goal, I need to create an individual column for each Group. Being able to sum by Group would allow me to use a single column, instead of multiple.

posts.author: sandy459333 (Sandy Esraeil)
posts.cookedHtml: I’d like the goals widget to be able to ONLY pull from a particular group, just like can be done in other widgets.
